name: No Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients until thick.
2. Cook until thickened.
3. Slice apples into the uncooked pie crust.
4. Pour the mixture over the apples.
5. Cover with the top pie crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
7. Apples can be sprinkled with one package of Sweet and low if desired.
Note: This pie can be made without crust to save calories. Pour the mixture over apples in a pie pan.
